channel.title: Strategy on Yuxin Fan
channel.description: Recent content in Strategy on Yuxin Fan

item.title: Multi-Third-Party Integration: Factory + Strategy in Practice
item.description: When integrating multiple external systems, treat each integration as an independent strategy and use a factory to select the implementation at runtime. Differences stay isolated in their own implementations; the main flow only cares about ‘who to call’ and ‘how to orchestrate’.
